name: mapbox-design
description: Forterra branded Mapbox GL map — static site, no build. Deploy to Vercel or any static host.

scripts.build: npm run build:legend && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f=p.join(process.cwd(),'js/config.js');let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const t=process.env.MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN||'REPLACE_MAPBOX_TOKEN';c=c.replace(/REPLACE_MAPBOX_TOKEN/g,t);fs.writeFileSync(f,c);"
